actions.text: ### Key Decisions and Agreements
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **V positioned AI consulting services** - Mentioned launching custom AI implementation consulting business (pricing: $5-10K for custom founder/VC operating systems). Rationale: Building portfolio of testimonials while expanding beyond Careerspan. Why it matters: Strategic pivot toward personal brand monetization alongside product development.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Technical architecture guidance provided** - V recommended daisy-chaining simple agents with dumb models (4.1 mini) over one-shot approaches with reasoning models. Context: Bonfire building sales intelligence tool that needs to merge healthcare data, web scraping, and user context into prep documents. Why this matters: Cost optimization and output reliability for Bonfire's agentic pipeline.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Model selection strategy clarified** - Advised against switching between model providers (OpenAI ↔ Gemini) mid-development; recommended choosing upfront and applying for Google Startup Program credits ($25K-$200K depending on funding stage). Why this matters: Bonfire can experiment more freely with credits rather than optimizing prematurely.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ### Strategic Context
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Jaya reached out seeking AI implementation advice for Bonfire's new sales enablement feature. Bonfire sells healthcare sales intelligence to digital health companies (customers: Growth Therapy, Headway, Nourish, medical device companies). They're moving downstream from strategic planning tools into real-time sales prep - generating call briefs by merging proprietary healthcare data (patient panels, procedure volumes) with web-scraped research (PubMed articles) and user-specified goals.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: V's positioning: Explicitly framing himself as consultant building reputation through helpful engagements. Personal context: Recent move to 343 Gold, proximity to mutual friend Matt. Relationship warmth: Former neighbors, casual banter about NYC real estate.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Careerspan context: V revealed strategic shift away from VC-scale ambitions toward self-sustaining product + personal consulting model. Philosophy: "People trust matters more than Meta-scale." Plan: Grow user base, keep product free/rebellious, exit in ~1 year with "couple hundred thousand people on it."
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Competitive landscape insight: V referenced Harvey (legal AI) charging $500K to law firms as example of B2B AI price inelasticity - implies Bonfire can afford higher token costs given healthcare customer willingness to pay for accuracy.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window
